title: Connect status to a person column

posts.author: cfish (cody wilke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Objective: Have 2 or more person columns where each person is responsible for something different on each item. In other words, a status column for each person to mark their own part as done.
Similar to how timeline can be connected to a specific status column, it would be great to connect a person with a specific status column.
Thanks!
